title: Flamingo/Spoonbill - Software update for standalone headset
scenario: Standalone headset (not paired with charge case) successfully completes DFU software update via the app when tapping the update button on the device home screen.
steps: 1. Tap the update button on device home screen.
2. Tap the Update Button and complete the DFU process.
expected: Device settings opens with Software Update tab expanded, only one update button is shown. DFU process for standalone headset can be properly completed.
